rules.e3-print-only-is-narrow: A script that only prints values or proves reachability is narrow evidence, not proof of the claimed invariant.
rules.e3-assertions-and-provenance: For a dynamic/E3 conclusion, preserve hard assertions for the claimed invariant, the exact invocation, exit status, and harness source hash.
rules.sse-replay-suffix: For SSE replay, assert event IDs are ordered with no duplicates or omissions, including the replay suffix after the cursor.

e3-print-only-is-narrow: only prints values or proves reachability
